title: Budget — default (Available)
cap: Default view: one Available to Spend column with a progress bar under each category. This is with ⋮ menu → Progress Bars ON.

title: Budget — Assigned & Available
cap: The SAME budget after ⋮ menu → Progress Bars is turned OFF: two columns (Assigned + Available), no bars. This is what you pressed to make the columns show.

title: Views filter sheet
cap: Top-bar Views icon: All / Underfunded / Overfunded / Money Available / Snoozed.

title: Month picker
cap: Tapping “Jul 2026 ▾” opens the month/year picker.

title: Edit Plan (Cost to Be Me)
cap: Set monthly income and per-category targets via Add Target — opens from the ✎ pencil icon in the top bar.

title: Filter applied — Underfunded
cap: Budget shows only underfunded categories; “Viewing Underfunded” banner with View All Categories to exit.

title: Overfunded — empty state
cap: No overfunded targets; “Um, why is this view always empty?” help link and View All.

title: Filter applied — Money Available
cap: “Viewing Money Available” banner over the filtered budget.

title: Snoozed — empty state
cap: No snoozed targets this month.

title: Manage Views
cap: Views sheet → Edit; lists the four stock views.

title: New View — name it
cap: Views sheet → New; name field (“Keep ’em short & sweet!”) with keyboard.

title: New View — pick categories
cap: Checklist of every category group to include in the custom view.

title: Overflow menu — full
cap: Every item top-to-bottom. Progress Bars toggles the Assigned/Available columns; Refresh (sync) and Support (help) act in place; the rest open the screens below.

title: → Recent Moves — All
cap: Money-move history, All tab.

title: → Recent Moves — Moved
cap: Moved tab (No Money Moves yet).

title: → Recent Moves — Assigned
cap: Assigned tab — where each dollar went.

title: → After Undo, menu shows Redo
cap: Once you undo, the menu’s second item becomes Redo.

title: → Undo — bottom popup
cap: Undo pops a bottom pill: Phone & Internet reverted to $0.00.

title: → Redo — bottom popup
cap: Redo pops the green pill: Phone & Internet re-applied at $20.00.

title: → Open Plan
cap: Switch plans / plans shared with you.

title: → Collapse/Expand
cap: Submenu: Collapse All / Expand All Groups.

title: → Collapse result
cap: Groups collapsed to headers only.

title: → Hide Amounts to Share
cap: Privacy mode — amounts masked.

title: Assign Money (helper)
cap: Reached by tapping the green Ready to Assign ▸ bar. Auto-assign helper; underfunded highlighted.

title: Assign Money — scrolled
cap: Wants group and remaining categories.

title: Auto-Assign by…
cap: Underfunded / Assigned Last Month / Spent Last Month / Average.

title: Assign amount — calculator keypad
cap: Tap a category’s amount on the budget → keypad slides up (with + − = calculator). Tabs: Auto-Assign / Move Money / Details.

title: Move Money
cap: Keypad → Move Money tab; From Ready to Assign → To a category, amount keypad.

title: Move Money — pick source
cap: Category picker: search, New Category, Selected + Inflow (Ready to Assign) and every group as radio rows.

title: Category picker — scrolled
cap: Wants group incl. “Stuff I forgot to plan for” and YNAB subscription.

title: Category Details
cap: Balance breakdown (From Jun, Assigned, Activity, Available), Create Target, Notes, Rename Category.

title: Target — Weekly
cap: “I need / Every Saturday / Next month I want to”, Save Target.

title: Weekly — day picker
cap: Choose the weekday the target refills.

title: Target amount keypad
cap: Amount entry for “I need”.

title: “Next month” sheet
cap: Set aside another $X/week vs Refill up to $X/week — “Most people choose this”.

title: Target — Yearly
cap: “I need / By Aug 1, 2026 / Next year I want to”.

title: Target date calendar
cap: Month-grid picker for the target due date.

title: “Next year” sheet
cap: Yearly version of set-aside vs refill.

title: Target — Custom
cap: Amount, “I want to: Set aside”, Due on, Repeat toggle (off).

title: “I want to” sheet
cap: Set aside / Fill up to / Have a balance of — the three custom behaviors.

title: Custom — Repeat on
cap: Repeat enabled → “Every 1 Month” row appears.

title: Repeat frequency spinner
cap: Numeric + Month/Year wheel for the repeat interval.

title: Plans & App
cap: Current plan, New/Open Plan, Make a Fresh Start.

title: App & Account
cap: Display Options, Notifications, App Lock, Share, Account.

title: Account & Misc
cap: Manage Bank Connections, Log Out, Diagnostics, Privacy, Terms.

title: Plan Settings
cap: Plan name, currency, number/date format, Delete Plan.

title: New Plan
cap: Name + currency (AUD) and formats for a fresh plan.

title: Make a Fresh Start
cap: Explainer of what carries over; archived copy kept; Continue.

title: Display Options
cap: Theme (Light/Dark/Match System) + Balance Style (color vs differentiate without color).

title: Dark theme applied
cap: The whole app re-skins instantly when Dark Theme is selected.

title: Register
cap: Transactions with search + uncleared filter.

title: Search + keyboard
cap: Searching the register.

title: Transaction — Outflow
cap: Payee, category, account, date, photo, memo, cleared, flag.

title: Transaction — Inflow
cap: Inflow toggle turns the amount green.

title: Transaction — details & delete
cap: Never Repeat and Delete Transaction.

title: Accounts
cap: Cash & Kun balances, Add Account, Manage Bank Connections.

title: Overview
cap: Spending Breakdown, Income vs Spending, Net Worth.

title: Net Worth & Age of Money
cap: Assets/Debts trend and Age of Money guidance.

title: Breakdown — by month
cap: Total spending and top categories.

title: Breakdown — month picker
cap: Pick the month/year for the breakdown.

title: Breakdown — presets
cap: Last 3/6/12 Months, Year to Date, Last Year, All Dates.

title: Breakdown — Last 3 Months
cap: Preset range applied (May–July 2026).

title: Breakdown — Filter
cap: Include/exclude category groups.

title: For You
cap: ‘You’re all caught up’, tips, connect with support.

title: Greeting & quick actions
cap: ‘Well, hello there Kunwar’, Pinned, Current Goal.
